{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323154935A16B79739DD045A8E540"}"},"total":1706},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7553823589530272536","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"本书是相当的不错，赞一个。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1758765694,"group_id":"7544979672602266686","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"爱小说","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7+EbsJvtLl7Es3IbQ/OHq9aLKfYk1DThojAKDc98nSY","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"2840780297471166","user_name":"用户28407802"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2840780297471166","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7544979672602266686","book_info":{"abstract":"【顶级背景+神级选择+无敌爽文+摆烂享受生活+舔狗女主】
江逸尘重生了，回到被女友林婉分手时。
前世他是华夏第一世家的少爷，父亲华夏第一武神，母亲华夏顶级财阀。
可如此逆天背景下，江逸尘却爱上了出身贫寒的林婉，并无底线的舔她。
为了完成她考上华夏第一战队的梦想，江逸尘花费无数资源创建战队，日夜操劳！帮助她考上华夏第一战队。
可……
“江逸尘我保送华夏第一战队了，我觉得我们不合适。”
林婉却提出了分手，四年的付出化为泡影。
重生而来，再次面对林婉提出分手，江逸尘却意外觉醒【摆烂选择系统】，只要做出摆烂选择，就能获得奖励。
江逸尘彻底不干了，直接摆烂，收回给林婉的一切。
系统的奖励也随之而来。
【叮！恭喜宿主做出摆烂选择，奖励至尊级 混沌体！】
【叮！恭喜宿主做出摆烂选择，奖励至尊级功法 虚空经！】
【叮！恭喜宿主做出摆烂选择，奖励至尊级 自动修炼！】
“……”
江逸尘开始摆烂后，境界自动提升，顶级功法拿到手软。
在不知不觉中，他躺成了武神，震惊华夏。
曾经说分手的林婉彻底后悔了，跪着求原谅。
江逸尘不屑一笑，“有多远滚多远！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/83956dabe9198139592c26f1fbe4bede","author":"难若惊鸿","author_id":"","book_id":"7544979672602266686","book_name":"开局顶级世家，我不吃牛肉，开爽","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202010","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"23.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":385,"name":"校花","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=385&name=校花&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7545121493777138238","read_count":"235739","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1078899"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"5.5","serial_count":"438","tags":"都市高武,都市,系统,重生,无敌,校花","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/5585fe5ac04ed5d289c2a761d8ac5ed0~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779436175&x-signature=UqEpTXfWYfaxdLes6nDkOmyViQY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2251439068414811","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"11"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323154935A16B79739DD045A8E540"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_dur 1.女主大家闺秀，瞩目之资，聪明灵慧，拿得起放得下，不给渣男机会。学识涵养都很丰富，智商在线，也绝不吃亏。
2.不多透，看了都会叹一句好
3.文笔扎实，描绘详细且生动，与古代文学之美相与体会，令人，舒服，没错，我词穷了，形容不住，但就是一种非常舒服的感觉。我觉得入股不亏。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1765933072,"group_id":"7544979672602266686","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5prZZJ0EhuhXUDT3VjV0nOKKdEKfVHt8mCjwbZYD1mL","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"1920200795503336","user_name":"用户19202007"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1920200795503336","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7544979672602266686","book_info":{"abstract":"【顶级背景+神级选择+无敌爽文+摆烂享受生活+舔狗女主】
